title: App Settings
unsaved_changes_warning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page? Your changes will be lost.

deletion_gate.title: Deletion requests
deletion_gate.description: Controls how GDPR deletion requests (Art. 17) are handled.

require_admin_approval.label: Require admin approval for deletion requests
require_admin_approval.description: When on (default), the office must manually approve each deletion request after the email confirmation step. When off, the request is executed immediately when the user clicks the confirmation link — faster, but without a human in the loop. Deletions of staff/admin accounts always require manual approval regardless of this setting.

members.title: Member Settings
members.allows_self_registration_desc: When on, people can register themselves via the login page. When off, the register buttons are hidden AND the registration endpoints are blocked server-side.
members.allows_trial_members_desc: Enable trial memberships for new users
members.only_members_trial_subs: Only Members Can Have Trial Subscriptions
members.only_members_trial_subs_desc: Restrict trial subscriptions to existing members
members.must_have_subscriptions_desc: All members must have at least one subscription
members.uses_member_loans_desc: Allow members to take loans from the cooperative
members.value_one_share_desc: Monetary value of one cooperative share
members.coop_payback_retention: Retention period for cancelled members' shares
members.coop_payback_retention_desc: Months that cooperative shares stay in the cooperative after a member exits before they become due to be paid back (0 = due immediately).
members.requires_paper_signature_for_membership_: When on, the membership consents must be printed, signed, and sent to the office. The office records receipt manually.

strategy.title: Billing Strategy
strategy.description: How member subscription charges are computed for each payment cycle.

payments.billing_strategy_desc: EXACT_PER_PERIOD bills exactly the deliveries that fall in each cycle. SMOOTHED bills the same amount every cycle, spread across the whole subscription term.
payments.bills_joker_deliveries_desc: If off, deliveries marked as joker are excluded from the billed amount.
payments.allows_solidarity_pricing_desc: Members may set their own price per delivery (at least the variation's configured floor; no upper bound). The reference price is shown as a suggestion.
payments.requires_paper_signature_for_sepa_mandat: When on, the SEPA mandate must be printed, signed, and sent to the office. The office records receipt manually.
payments.due_day_desc: Day of the month each charge is due. Capped at 28 to avoid issues with short months.
payments.sepa_collection_day_desc: Default day of the month the bank should execute the SEPA direct-debit collection. Pre-filled as the collection date when an office user creates a billing run. Capped at 28.

commissioning.percentage_added_to_bulk_packing_list_de: can be adjusted directly for each vegetable
commissioning.percentage_added_to_bulk_packing_list: additional % for packing lists (only relevant if members pack their own crates)‚
commissioning.allow_upload_for_data_lists_desc: To load larger amounts of data into the data lists (e.g. vegetables for shares), CSV files can be used for upload.
commissioning.show_seller_name_in_share: Show the supplier name for bought-in items in crates to members.
commissioning.packing_mode_description: How members receive their shares. Boxes: all shares pre-packed per delivery station. Bulk: members pick from bulk crates. Mixed: per share-type variation choice.
commissioning.packing_mode_boxes: Crates are pre-packed / ready-made crates are delivered to the delivery stations
commissioning.packing_mode_bulk: Members pack their own crates at the delivery stations
commissioning.show_summary_in_harvest_share_planning_o: Show summary rows at the top of crate planning
commissioning.default_planning_mode_description: This is only the default setting. It can be changed every week.

tax_rates.title: Default Tax Rates
tax_rates.description: These default tax rates will be pre-filled when creating new pricing records. They can be adjusted at any point throughout the app.

trial.title: Trial Shares
trial.description: Controls whether trial memberships are possible and which conditions apply to them.

commissioning.allowed_trial_subscription_duration_desc: Maximum term of a trial membership.
commissioning.allows_trial_subscriptions_for_trial_mem: Determines whether trial members can also take out trial subscriptions.
commissioning.uses_jokers_for_trial_subscriptions_desc: Determines whether jokers are also counted against trial subscriptions.
commissioning.min_weeks_cancel: Minimum Weeks to Cancel Before End
commissioning.min_weeks_cancel_description: Minimum number of weeks before its end by which a subscription must be cancelled.
commissioning.share_type_changes: Allow Share Size Changes During Active Subscription
commissioning.allows_share_type_variation_optin_desc: Individual share variations can be released so that they can be added spontaneously on a week-by-week basis.
commissioning.allows_waiting_list_for_subscriptions_de: When on, at-capacity share variations and full delivery stations can be put on a waiting list. When off, full options are simply not selectable (no waiting list, no offers).
commissioning.reservation_ttl_days_desc: How long a draft subscription holds its delivery-station slot before the reservation lapses.

reseller.footer_left_placeholder: Enter left footer (e.g. company contact details)...
reseller.delivery_entry_1_description: This text appears on delivery notes above the article table. First line.
reseller.delivery_entry_2_description: This text appears on delivery notes above the article table. Second line.
reseller.delivery_entry_3_description: This text appears on delivery notes above the article table. Third line.
reseller.delivery_greeting_1_description: This text appears on delivery notes below the article table. First line.
reseller.delivery_greeting_2_description: This text appears on delivery notes below the article table. Second line.
reseller.delivery_greeting_3_description: This text appears on delivery notes below the article table. Third line.
reseller.invoice_entry_1_description: This text appears on invoices above the article table. First line.
reseller.invoice_entry_2_description: This text appears on invoices above the article table. Second line.
reseller.invoice_entry_3_description: This text appears on invoices above the article table. Third line.
reseller.invoice_greeting_1_description: This text appears on invoices below the article table. First line.
reseller.invoice_greeting_2_description: This text appears on invoices below the article table. Second line.
reseller.invoice_greeting_3_description: This text appears on invoices below the article table. Third line.
reseller.footer_left_description: This text appears in the left column of the footer on invoices and delivery notes.
reseller.footer_middle_description: This text appears in the middle column of the footer on invoices and delivery notes.
reseller.footer_right_description: This text appears in the right column of the footer on invoices and delivery notes.
reseller.payment_terms_desc: Number of days until payment is due for resellers
reseller.order_numbers_reset: Reset Order Numbers at Year End
reseller.order_numbers_reset_desc: Start order numbering at 1 each year
reseller.delivery_note_reset: Reset Delivery Note Numbers at Year End
reseller.delivery_note_numbers_reset_desc: Start delivery note numbering at 1 each year
reseller.invoice_reset: Reset Invoice Numbers at Year End
reseller.invoice_numbers_reset_desc: Start invoice numbering at 1 each year

offer_settings.title: Offer Settings
offer_settings.description: Configuration of price tiers for offers to resellers. Up to three tiers can be defined.

reseller.offer_tiers_desc: Tiered pricing starting from a certain number of packaging units (PU). The first tier always starts from 1 PU.
reseller.offer_prices_are_per_pu: Show prices per packaging unit in offers
reseller.offer_prices_are_per_pu_desc: When enabled, prices in offers will be displayed per packaging unit (PU) instead of per kilogram/piece.
reseller.offer_entry_1_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers above the article table. First line.
reseller.offer_entry_2_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers above the article table. Second line.
reseller.offer_entry_3_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers above the article table. Third line.
reseller.offer_greeting_1_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers below the article table. First line.
reseller.offer_greeting_2_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers below the article table. Second line.
reseller.offer_greeting_3_description: This text appears on offers sent to resellers below the article table. Third line.
reseller.offer_order_instructions_description: Free-form text printed between the entry lines and the offers table. Typical content: order acceptance, order deadline, where to send the completed order.
reseller.offer_order_instructions_placeholder: Enter order instructions (e.g. ordering deadline Thursday 12:00)...

preview.title: Preview with current text
preview.description: Generates a sample PDF using fake reseller / item data so you can see how your edits to the entry lines, greeting lines and footer columns will look on a real document. Unsaved changes are included.

trial.title: Trial Membership
trial.description: Controls whether trial memberships are possible and which conditions apply to them.

subscriptions.allowed_trial_subscription_duration_desc: Maximum term of a trial membership.
subscriptions.allows_trial_subscriptions_for_trial_mem: Determines whether trial members can also take out trial subscriptions.
subscriptions.uses_jokers_for_trial_subscriptions_desc: Determines whether jokers are also counted against trial subscriptions.
